title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
summary: A comprehensive textbook covering algorithms, data structures, sorting, graph algorithms, and algorithmic analysis. Widely used in undergraduate and graduate computer science courses.

title: Database System Concepts
author: Abraham Silberschatz
summary: Covers relational databases, SQL, transactions, indexing, and database design. A standard reference for database courses.

title: Operating System Concepts
author: Abraham Silberschatz
summary: Explains process management, memory management, file systems, and concurrency in modern operating systems.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
summary: A romantic novel of manners following Elizabeth Bennet as she navigates issues of marriage, morality, and society in early 19th century England.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
summary: A popular science book explaining cosmology, black holes, and the nature of time and the universe for general readers.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
summary: A guide to writing readable, maintainable software, covering naming, functions, testing, and code smells.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
summary: Explores the history of the human species from the Stone Age to the present, covering the cognitive, agricultural, and scientific revolutions.
